label: Impact: The Chicxulub Asteroid
description: A 10km-wide asteroid strikes the Yucatan Peninsula. The energy release is equivalent to billions of Hiroshima bombs, vaporizing rock and water instantly.

label: Minutes Later: Supersonic Shockwave
description: A massive shockwave radiates from the impact site, leveling forests and destroying everything in its path for thousands of kilometers.

label: Hours Later: The Sky on Fire
description: Vaporized rock launched into space falls back as 'ejecta'. Friction heats the atmosphere to oven-like temperatures, igniting global wildfires.

label: Hours Later: Megatsunamis
description: Massive waves hundreds of meters high scour the coastlines of the world, rearranging the geography of the Gulf of Mexico.

label: Weeks Later: Impact Winter
description: Soot and sulfur block the sun. Photosynthesis stops, and global temperatures plummet. The world enters a deep, dark freeze.

label: Months Later: Acid Rain
description: Sulfur in the atmosphere creates highly acidic rain, devastating the remaining vegetation and marine life.

label: Years Later: The End of Dinosaurs
description: With the food chain shattered, 75% of all species, including all non-avian dinosaurs, go extinct.

label: 100k Years Later: Life Recovers
description: Small scavengers and burrowing mammals emerge into a new world, beginning the long process of evolutionary recovery.
